accounts.name: lend_mint
docs: The lend token mint (token being borrowed).

accounts.name: authority
docs: The borrower

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: The user's lend-token account (destination) — created if it doesn't exist yet

accounts.name: lend_vault
docs: The pool's lend vault (source of borrowed tokens)

accounts.name: user_position
docs: The user's position — collateral balance and active borrow fields.

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool data account.  Must be pre-allocated (size = POOL_SPACE) and
owned by this program before calling `create`.  Pre-allocating in a
separate transaction bypasses the 10 KB CPI account-creation limit.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: Token vault for holding deposited collateral tokens.

accounts.name: lend_vault
docs: Token vault for holding deposited lend tokens.

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: The LP token mint for the lend side of this pool.

docs: The authority that will control this pool.

docs: The account that pays for account creation.

docs: The pool's lend vault — holds lend tokens; source for withdrawal.

docs: The lend token mint accepted by this pool.

docs: The pool's LP token mint. `state` PDA is the mint authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The depositor.

accounts.name: user_lend_token_account

docs: The user's LP token account — created if it doesn't already exist.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The mint of the token being withdrawn.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: Destination token account for the queued withdrawal.
Must be owned by the requester recorded in the head queue entry.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: The user's position PDA derived from the pool and the requester.
Seeds: ["user_position", pool, requester].

accounts.name: vault
docs: The pool's token vault (source of funds).

accounts.name: lend_mint
docs: The lend token mint accepted by this pool.

accounts.name: requester_lend_token_account
docs: The requester's lend-token destination account.
Must be owned by the pubkey stored in the head queue entry.
Created if it doesn't exist yet.

accounts.name: requester
docs: Validated in the handler against the stored pubkey.

accounts.name: lend_vault
docs: The pool's lend vault — holds lend tokens; source for withdrawal.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays for any account creation (requester ATA init_if_needed).

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: The LP token mint for this lending pool

accounts.name: authority
docs: The user burning LP tokens

accounts.name: user_lp_token_account
docs: The user's LP token account (source for burning)

accounts.name: user_position
docs: The user's position — credited with the lend-side value of the LP tokens

docs: The lend token mint (token being repaid).

accounts.name: authority

accounts.name: lend_vault

accounts.name: user_position
docs: The user's position — borrow fields are reset on successful repay

errors.name: AlreadyBorrowed
errors.msg: An open borrow position already exists; repay before borrowing again

errors.name: WithdrawalQueueFull
errors.msg: Withdrawal queue is full; try again later

errors.name: QueueEntryMismatch
errors.msg: Provided account does not match the queued withdrawal entry

types.name: Pool
docs: Unified lending pool account stored as zero-copy.
Manages three token mints:
- `collateral_mint`: tokens users deposit as collateral to enable borrowing
- `lend_mint`:       tokens lenders deposit (earning LP) and borrowers receive
- `lp_mint`:         issued 1:1 to lend-side depositors; redeemable for lend tokens
Field ordering eliminates implicit repr(C) padding:
offsets 0-127   : four Pubkeys  (4 × 32 = 128 bytes, align 1)
offsets 176-207 : fee_config   (4 × u64 = 32)
offsets 208-209 : ltv_percent, lp_mint_bump  (2 × u8)
offsets 210-215 : _pad [u8; 6]  (align withdrawal_queue to 8)
offsets 216-... : WithdrawalQueue  (1024 entries × 40 bytes = 40 960 + 8 header)

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: Mint of the token deposited as collateral (tracked raw, no LP issued).

fields.name: lend_mint
docs: Mint of the token lenders deposit and borrowers receive.

fields.name: lp_mint
docs: LP token mint issued to lend-side depositors.

fields.name: total_collateral_deposited
docs: Raw sum of collateral tokens deposited across all positions.

fields.name: total_lend_deposited
docs: Sum of lend tokens currently deposited (basis for LP ratio and utilisation).

fields.name: total_lp_issued
docs: Total LP tokens outstanding for the lend side.

fields.name: withdrawal_queue
docs: Queue of pending lend-token withdrawals (LP burned at `leave` time).

types.name: UserPosition
docs: Tracks a user's collateral deposit and any open borrow position.
Created on first collateral deposit; borrow fields populated when the user borrows.

fields.name: authority
docs: The user who owns this position

fields.name: pool
docs: The pool this position belongs to

fields.name: collateral_deposited
docs: Raw amount of collateral tokens deposited (no shares — tracked 1:1).

fields.name: lp_tokens_owed
docs: LP tokens that will be minted when `take_lp` is called (legacy; 0 for collateral positions).

fields.name: debt_shares
docs: Debt shares held by this user (0 if no active borrow).
Current debt = debt_shares * pool.total_borrowed / pool.total_debt_shares

types.name: WithdrawalQueue
docs: Fixed-capacity circular-buffer queue of withdrawal requests embedded
directly in `Pool` account data.  Exposed as zero-copy to avoid copying
the ~40 KB array onto the stack during Borsh deserialization.

types.name: WithdrawalQueueEntry
docs: A single pending withdrawal request.
`user_position` and destination ATA are derived from `requester` at
execution time so they do not need to be stored here.

fields.name: requester
docs: The user authority who requested the withdrawal.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of underlying tokens to withdraw.
